sp_instance.placeholder_template: {{options.advancedOptions.title}}
sp_instance.title: Quick Links

sys_update_version.name: sp_instance_b5b1cdac9359c350945375dcebba10ee
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sp_instance"><sp_instance action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><advanced_placeholder_dimensions>true</advanced_placeholder_dimensions><async_load>true</async_load><async_load_device_type>desktop,mobile,tablet</async_load_device_type><async_load_trigger>viewport</async_load_trigger><class_name/><color>default</color><css/><glyph/><id/><order>2</order><placeholder_dimensions>{
  "mobile": {
    "height": "100%",
    "width": "100%"
  },
  "desktop": {
    "height": "100%",
    "width": "100%"
  },
  "tablet": {
    "height": "100%",
    "width": "100%"
  }
}</placeholder_dimensions><placeholder_dimensions_script><![CDATA[function evaluateConfig(options) {
    return {
        "mobile": {
            "height": "100%",
            "width": "100%"
        },
        "desktop": {
            "height": "100%",
            "width": "100%"
        },
        "tablet": {
            "height": "100%",
            "width": "100%"
        },
	title: gs.getMessage(options.title) || gs.getMessage('Quick links')
    };
}]]></placeholder_dimensions_script><placeholder_template><div class="skeleton-loader-container panel panel-wrapper">
  <div class="panel-heading b-b">
    <h3 class="panel-title">
      {{options.advancedOptions.title}}
    </h3>
  </div>
  <div class="skeleton-loader-body panel-body">
    <div class="skeleton-loading-card-container skeleton-quicklink-grid"
         ng-init="quickLinkArray = (options.quick_links ? options.quick_links.split(',') : [].constructor(3)).slice(0,6)">
      <div class="skeleton-loader-card-quicklink skeleton-item-quicklink"
           ng-repeat="item in quickLinkArray track by $index">
        <div class="skeleton-item"></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div></placeholder_template><preserve_placeholder_size>false</preserve_placeholder_size><roles/><short_description/><size>md</size><sp_column display_value="1">f1b1cdac9359c350945375dcebba10ea</sp_column><sp_widget display_value="Quick Links">dae53627530030101865ddeeff7b12be</sp_widget><sys_class_name>sp_instance</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-02 10:34:51</sys_created_on><sys_id>b5b1cdac9359c350945375dcebba10ee</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Quick Links</sys_name><sys_package display_value="msdportal" source="x_146833_msdportal">d5d7a83f93898b10945375dcebba1081</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="msdportal">d5d7a83f93898b10945375dcebba1081</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sp_instance_b5b1cdac9359c350945375dcebba10ee</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-02 10:39:07</sys_updated_on><title>Quick Links</title><url/><widget_parameters><![CDATA[{
	"title": {
		"value": "",
		"displayValue": ""
	},
	"card_type": {
		"value": "Thumbnail",
		"displayValue": "Thumbnail"
	},
	"card_size": {
		"value": "Medium",
		"displayValue": "Medium"
	},
	"text_alignment": {
		"value": "Center",
		"displayValue": "Center"
	},
	"show_icon": {
		"value": "true",
		"displayValue": "true"
	},
	"show_background": {

		"displayValue": "true"
	},
	"show_description": {

		"displayValue": "true"
	},
	"background_color": {

	},
	"quick_links": {
		"value": "9b729365e71130104cda66ef11e8a9a7,aff317a5e71130104cda66ef11e8a939,4e116048e76530104cda66ef11e8a9bc",
		"displayValue": [
			"Password Reset",
			"System Status",
			"Request Standing Desk"
		]
	},
	"show_text_overlay": {
		"value": "true",

	},
	"text_overlay_hexcode": {

	"text_color": {

	},

	}
}]]></widget_parameters></sp_instance><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=b5b1cdac9359c350945375dcebba10ee"/></record_update>
